caption: In an indoor venue with a high ceiling and large chandeliers, several individuals practice martial arts on a blue mat. In the foreground, a man in a yellow traditional uniform performs dynamic movements with a red staff. He begins in a wide stance, transitions into a jumping motion, and ends in a poised stance with the staff held horizontally. Around him, other practitioners in blue and white uniforms also handle staffs, mirroring his movements or practicing their own routines. A crowd of spectators is seated in the background, watching the performance. The scene shifts as the man in yellow progresses through his sequence of strikes and stances, while the others in the background maintain their positions or move in coordination. The lighting is bright, emanating from recessed ceiling lights and the central ornate chandeliers.
